task.desc: Add a comment near the TRANSITION_IDS dict documenting the mapping of state names to transition IDs

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add comment near TRANSITION_IDS dict documenting mapping of state names to transition IDs","target_files":["scripts/jira-drain.py"],"patch_commands":["sed -i '/TRANSITION_IDS/,/TRANSITION_IDS/' scripts/jira-drain.py","validation_commands":["grep -q 'TRANSITION_IDS' scripts/jira-drain.py","expected_outcome":"Comment added near TRANSITION_IDS dict","risk_notes":"No risk","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}
